title: narcissus assoanus var. pallens
intro: Narcissus assoanus var. pallens is a plant species within the Amaryllidaceae family, specifically a variant of the Narcissus assoanus, which is a type of wild daffodil. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Narcissus assoanus var. pallens include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution is advised due to the risk of toxicity from its alkaloids.
